item.title: Fact check: Ye did showcase a Raëlian symbol
item.description: “Love everyone. #lovespeech” was Ye’s accompanying tweet saying. The emblematic symbol combining the Shield of David and the Swastika represents infinity in the Raëlian theology. Indeed a symbol that colloquially equated with love among Raëlians. Fact # Yes, the screenshot portraying a computer screen showing an open Adobe Photoshop window which itself displays a weird looking symbol in black on white background. That symbol clearly has the shape of the infamous Star of David, also called Magen David (shield of David) featuring an interconnected Swastika in its center.

item.title: Hello World!👋
item.description: Introducing Doks, a Hugo theme helping you build modern documentation websites that are secure, fast, and SEO-ready — by default.
